summary: Testing iteration 6: Tested the new Global Search feature for the Offensive Security Portfolio. The search is accessible via button click in navbar and keyboard shortcut (Ctrl/Cmd+K). Search queries writeups via API and filters resources client-side. All search functionality tests passed including opening dialog, searching writeups, navigation to writeup detail page, and closing dialog. All existing features continue to work (admin auth, resource CRUD, public pages).

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for accessibility (screen reader users)
When API returns 429 rate limit error, the UI shows 'No results found' instead of a meaningful error message (silently fails)

action_items: Add DialogTitle to SearchCommand for accessibility compliance (minor)
Consider showing user-friendly error message when search API returns rate limit error instead of showing 'No results found' (minor UX)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing data in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global search feature fully tested. Search opens via button click or Ctrl+K, queries /api/writeups?search= endpoint, filters resources client-side. Clicking writeup result navigates to /writeup/{id}. Rate limiting may cause intermittent test failures if too many API calls are made in quick succession.

tested_features.search_button_visible: PASS - Search button visible in navbar with keyboard shortcut hint
tested_features.search_dialog_opens_on_click: PASS - Dialog opens with search input on button click
tested_features.search_dialog_opens_on_ctrl_k: PASS - Dialog opens with Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut
tested_features.search_writeups: PASS - Searching for 'Lame' returns writeup results with difficulty color
tested_features.search_result_navigation: PASS - Clicking writeup result navigates to /writeup/{id}
tested_features.search_no_results: PASS - Shows 'No results found' message for non-matching queries
tested_features.search_dialog_closes_on_esc: PASS - Dialog closes when ESC is pressed
tested_features.search_placeholder_for_short_query: PASS - Shows 'Type to search' for queries under 2 characters
tested_features.admin_login_flow: PASS - Admin login still working correctly
tested_features.public_pages: PASS - All public pages load correctly
